keyExpressions.en: What are you going to do this summer?
I'm going to take swimming lessons.
I'm going to visit my aunt in Busan.
I'm going to take a trip to Jeju-do.
I'm looking forward to meeting her.

exercises.q: What ___ you going to do this summer?
I'm ___ to visit my grandparents.
I'm looking ___ to the trip.
I'm looking forward to ___ new friends.
She ___ going to take a cooking class.
I'm looking forward to ___ the museum.
'be going to'는 미래 계획을 말할 때 쓴다.
'look forward to' 뒤에는 동사원형이 온다.

passages.title: 본문 ① - Ronda, Spain (민지의 편지)
passages.en: I traveled to Spain during the vacation with my family. We visited many amazing cities. Most of them were awesome, but I liked Ronda the most. Most buildings in Ronda were white. They looked beautiful against the blue sky. We walked along the cliff and the view was fantastic! We ate churros at a terrace restaurant. They were especially delicious. We also took the "Ernest Hemingway Walk." I enjoyed walking and taking pictures. I'm looking forward to our next trip!
passages.ko: 나는 방학 동안 가족과 함께 스페인을 여행했어. 우리는 놀라운 도시들을 많이 방문했어. 대부분 근사했지만 나는 론다가 가장 좋았어. 론다의 대부분의 건물들은 하얀색이었어. 파란 하늘에 대조되어 아름다워 보였어. 우리는 절벽을 따라 걸었고 경치가 환상적이었어! 테라스 식당에서 추로스를 먹었어. 특히 맛있었어. 또 '어니스트 헤밍웨이 산책로'도 걸었어. 산책하며 사진 찍는 것이 즐거웠어. 다음 여행이 기대돼!

passages.title: 본문 ② - Chefchaouen, Morocco (제이 삼촌의 이메일)
passages.en: I spent all day in Chefchaouen today. People call it the "Blue Pearl of Morocco." The streets and buildings are all blue, so walking through the narrow streets was like walking in a dream! They were full of interesting shops. I bought some souvenirs for you. I drank some mint tea with a local. He told me the city is famous for its blue color. The sunrise here was beautiful, too. I got up early this morning and saw the blue buildings under a purple sky.
passages.ko: 오늘 하루 종일 쉐프샤우엔에서 보냈어. 사람들은 이 도시를 '모로코의 푸른 진주'라고 불러. 거리와 건물이 모두 파란색이어서 좁은 거리를 걷는 것은 꿈속을 걷는 것 같았어! 흥미로운 가게들로 가득했어. 기념품을 좀 샀어. 현지인과 함께 민트 차를 마셨어. 그가 이 도시는 파란색으로 유명하다고 했어. 이곳의 일출도 아름다웠어. 오늘 아침 일찍 일어나서 보라색 하늘 아래 파란 건물들을 봤어.

passages.title: 본문 ③ - Purple Island, Korea (에이미의 편지)
passages.en: I visited Purple Island in Korea last week. Almost everything on the island is purple — houses, buses, and even bridges! The entrance fee was free because I wore purple. On my way to the island, I used a bike rental and explored the island by bicycle. I visited the Lavender Garden. The purple flowers were so beautiful. It was a perfect day! I'm going to explore more places like this.
passages.ko: 지난주에 한국의 퍼플섬을 방문했어. 섬의 거의 모든 것이 보라색이야 — 집, 버스, 심지어 다리까지! 나는 보라색 옷을 입어서 입장이 무료였어. 섬으로 가는 길에 자전거를 빌려서 자전거로 섬을 탐험했어. 라벤더 정원을 방문했어. 보라색 꽃들이 정말 아름다웠어. 완벽한 하루였어! 이런 곳을 더 탐험할 거야.

exercises.q: Most buildings in Ronda were ___.
I enjoyed ___ and taking pictures.
People call it the "Blue ___ of Morocco."
Walking through the narrow streets was like walking in a ___.
The ___ fee was free because I wore purple.
론다의 건물들은 파란색이었다.
쉐프샤우엔은 '모로코의 푸른 진주'라고 불린다.
퍼플섬에서는 보라색 옷을 입으면 입장료가 무료이다.
에이미는 버스로 퍼플섬을 탐험했다.
I enjoyed walk and take pictures.
She is go to visit Japan.
I look forward to meet her.

points.title: be going to (미래 계획)
points.explanation: 'be going to + 동사원형'은 미래에 할 계획이나 의도를 나타냅니다. 주어에 따라 am/are/is를 씁니다.

examples.en: I'm going to explore them by bicycle.
She is going to visit her aunt.
We are going to take a trip.
Are you going to travel this summer?

points.title: 동명사 (V-ing as a noun)
points.explanation: 동사에 -ing를 붙여 명사처럼 쓰는 것을 동명사라고 합니다. 주어, 보어, 목적어 자리에 올 수 있습니다. enjoy, finish, practice, mind + 동명사

examples.en: Walking through the streets was fun.
I look forward to meeting you.

exercises.q: I ___ going to visit Japan.
She is going to ___ a new language.
I enjoy ___.
___ books is my hobby.
She finished ___ her homework.
We ___ going to take a trip to Busan.
I enjoyed ___ pictures.
___ you going to come to the party?
My hobby is ___ stamps.

exercises.a: She is going to study English.

exercises.q: I'm going to visited Japan.
I enjoy swim.
He is go to play soccer.
She finished to read the book.
